full_text:
Deng Yang (Xuanmao) 鄧颺 (玄茂)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Yang (鄧颺), styledXuanmao (玄茂). Officer of Cao Shuang, dismissed Guan Lu’s predictions. Confessed to revolt and executed. Deng Yang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Deng Yang lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
